---
title: "Wrapping up"
---
::: {.callout-tip collapse=true}
# Learning Goals: Wrapping up
(To be added)
:::


| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 12/3  | Explanatory frameworks | Embick & Poeppel (2014) | [Submit questions](https://www.menti.com/bldf9ra1coas) |
| Tues 12/8 | Researcher panel
